sys_script_include.description:
This Script is used for the initial release of Task Privacy After the initial release, some of this may move into other functions 2.8.3 | 2023-06-30 - raj - DFCT0012060 - Stretch/ Known issue: Users in 2 Top OUs (Private or Public) cannot create new Tasks/Templates for their secondary OUs (not their default OU) 2.8.3 | 2023-06-19 - raj - DFCT0011913- Permissive OU office selection and member selections are available to all users in a controlled tasker setting even if that OU is outside their tasking pattern. 2.8.3 | 2023-06-16 - raj - DFCT0012002 - New Task Form > as a TM > "Reviewer", "On behalf of", and "Task Owner" the choice list of "Member(s)" can only choose themselves 2.8.3 | 2023-06-16 - raj - DFCT0011930 - Global Hierarchy Admins in a Private OU can see and modify all OUs even open OUs. The Private OUs cannot be seen by users in an Open OU (good thing) 2.8.3 | 2023-06-16 - raj - DFCT0011967 - With Organizational Privacy turned On ~ Users in a Private Structure should NOT see another Open Structure's OU 2.8.3 | 2023-06-16 - raj - DFCT0011988 - "Create Top Organizational Unit" should NOT display duplicate fields on the modal 2.8.3 | 2023-06-16 - raj - DFCT0011990 - With Organizational Privacy turned On ~ Users in a Private Structure should NOT be sent Org Request from another Open Structure's OU 2.8.3 | 2023-06-16 - raj - DFCT0011994 - With Organizational Privacy turned On ~ Users in an Open Structure should NOT see the Private Structure's OU, "Org Request". 2.8.3 | 2023-06-11 - raj - DFCT0011966 - With Organizational Privacy turned On ~ GHA user in a Private Structure cannot "Add Member" on Sub OU. (It should be allowed) 2.8.3 | 2023-06-10 - raj - DFCT0011913- Permissive OU office selection and member selections are available to all users in a controlled tasker setting even if that OU is outside their tasking pattern. 2.8.3 | 2023-06-09 - raj - DFCT0011965 - With Organizational Privacy turned On ~ Users in a Private Structure should NOT edit another Open Structure's OU Tasks 2.8.3 | 2023-06-06 - raj - DFCT0011930 - Global Hierarchy Admins in a Private OU can see and modify all OUs even open OUs. The Private OUs cannot be seen by users in an Open OU (good thing) 2.8.3 | 2023-06-05 - raj - DFCT0011928 - GTD, TPA, TE, and TA's in a Private OU can see and modify all global templates even if they are from an open OU. 2.8.3 | 2023-06-05 - raj - DFCT0011926 - In New Task/Subtask Form, choosing an Assigned Member while the Primary Assignee is empty does NOT auto-populate to the Default OU of the Assigned Member 2.8.3 | 2023-05-29 - raj - DFCT0011849 - On new template form~ Adding an "Assigned Member" is clearing the "Primary Assignee" field and causes the reviewer field to be empty 2.8.3 | 2023-05-26 - raj - STRY0139617 update for this story to handle case where Tasking is Open 2.8.3 | 2023-05-26 - raj - DFCT0011912 - Open/Matrixed TMs and Basic Users cannot task any other OUs in the Primary Assignee selection.2.8.x | 2023-05-19 - raj - DFCT0011843 - Viewing Report ~ TA should NOT see tasks from different OUs in the "Task Administrator" ~ "Open Top Tasks" Dashboard
2.8.x | 2023-05-16 - raj - DFCT0011847- With Organizational Privacy turned On ~ Different Private OU Global Templates are displayed for the "CE" 2.8.x | 2023-05-12 - raj - DFCT0011850 - With Organizational Privacy turned on > Global Templates > clear the "Primary Assignee > different private OU member are displaying "Reviewer", "Assigned Member 2.8.x | 2023-05-01 - raj - DFCT0011800 - TAA > click > Organizational Hierarchy Tree Bi-Fold . ERROR DISPLAY (or any ATF users) 2.8.x | 2023-05-04 - raj - STRY0139614 - Modify Task Assignment with a Private OU - Selecting Users for users not dependent on Primary Assignee 2.8.x | 2023-05-04 - raj - STRY0139615 - Modify Template Assignment with a Private OU - Selecting Users for users not dependent on Primary Assignee 2.8.x | 2023-05-04 - raj - STRY0139616 - Modify Template Assignment with a Open OU - Selecting Users for users not dependent on Primary Assignee 2.8.x | 2023-05-04 - raj - STRY0139617 - Modify Task Assignment with a Open - Selecting Users for users not dependent on Primary Assignee 2.8.x | 2023-05-04 - raj - STRY0139618 - Modify Task Assignment with a Private - Selecting Primary Assignee Office 2.8.x | 2023-05-04 - raj - STRY0139619 - Modify Template Assignment with a Private OU - Selecting Primary Assignee
sys_script_include.name: task_privacy
